case.title: KRUPA v. FARMINGTON RIVER POWER CO.

opinion.h: KRUPA v. FARMINGTON RIVER POWER CO., 364 U.S. 506 (1960)
KRUPA ET AL. v. FARMINGTON RIVER POWER CO. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ERRORS OF CONNECTICUT. No. 403, Misc. Decided December 12, 1960.
opinion.p: The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
